Title: ARI1
Notes: The value of this index ranges from 0 to more than 0.2. The common range for green vegetation is 0.001 to 0.1.

Title: ARI2
Notes: The value of this index ranges from 0 to more than 0.2. The common range for green vegetation is 0.001 to 0.1.

Title: CRI1
Notes: The value of this index ranges from 0 to more than 15. The common range for green vegetation is 1 to 12.

Title: CRI2
Notes: The value of this index ranges from 0 to more than 15. The common range for green vegetation is 1 to 11.

Title: SIPI
Notes: The value of this index ranges from 0 to 2. The common range for green vegetation is 0.8 to 1.8.  Peñuelas et al. (1995)

Title: CNDVI
Notes: The value of this index ranges from -1 to 1. The common range for green vegetation is 0.2 to 0.8.

Title: NDVI
Notes: The value of this index ranges from -1 to 1. The common range for green vegetation is 0.2 to 0.8.
